title: Recurring QIF spec alignment audit
description: Run QIF quality-intent/risk/loss audits against docs/specs/v0.1 at each stage boundary and before closing major tasks; update the QIF report, STATUS handoff, and task triage notes with pass/defer/fix decisions.
triage_notes: Cadence task requested by human. Trigger after each TASK-005+ completion, before any v0.1 acceptance/release checkpoint, and whenever implementation changes public API/render semantics. Completion is recurring; keep open until v0.1 acceptance matrix is complete.
